attacking_style: Opportunistic late attacks inside final 2km, exploiting hesitation and tactical stalemates among GC teams when they neutralize each other. Waits for others' pace-forcing to create selection before launching.
team_tactics: Benefits from other teams' work rather than own team setup. Capitalizes on chaos created by GC squads (e.g., INEOS pace-forcing) to attack when their job is done.
terrain_preference: Reduced bunch scenarios after hard pace-making has shattered the field. Thrives when GC riders have exhausted domestiques and are isolated.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify clear vulnerabilities. Likely struggles when required to force pace himself or when GC teams cooperate to control breakaways.
key_patterns: Attacks very late (<2km) when GC riders watch each other instead of chasing
Exploits psychological stalemates and hesitation among favorites calculating against each other
Wins from situations created by other teams' aggressive racing and domestique work
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from 2021 Vuelta stage win, insufficient recent data for trajectory assessment
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20
